headline: First Pacific Advisors Star Investor Current Holdings
summary: This article details the current holdings of First Pacific Advisors, LLC, a Los Angeles-based investment management firm focused on value investing. It provides an overview of their portfolio for Q3 2025, including their top buys and sells, sector allocation, and a list of their top 10 holdings with specific financial data. The firm manages several FPA funds and has a portfolio of 134 shares totaling $10.90 billion, with 38.45% in its top 10 holdings.
label: positive

headline: GPT ETF Analysis: Dividends, Returns NASDAQ:GPT
summary: This article provides an in-depth analysis of the Intelligent Alpha Atlas ETF (GPT), highlighting its investment strategy, key statistics, and performance. GPT is an actively managed ETF that leverages both AI and human expertise to invest in global large-cap stocks. The analysis covers its asset allocation, top holdings, dividend history, and frequently asked questions, noting its recent name change from Intelligent Livermore ETF (LIVR).
label: positive

headline: Alphabet’s stock just had its best quarter in two decades thanks to AI
summary: Alphabet's Class A stock recorded its best quarter since 2005, gaining 38%, driven by advancements in Google’s Gemini and cloud-computing businesses. The Google parent company’s stock clinched its biggest quarterly gain in 20 years, with shares of Class A stock (GOOGL) closing at $243.10. Its Class C shares (GOOG) also saw a significant rise of 37%, marking their best quarterly performance on record.
